headline: How The Pearson (LSE:PSON) Narrative Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation And Growth Assumptions
summary: Pearson’s updated fair value price target of £11.83, compared with £11.70 previously, reflects small adjustments running through new analyst models. Recent research has pulled targets both higher and lower as analysts react to the latest results and bring Pearson closer in line with broader media sector peers. Read on to see what is driving these shifts and how you can track the next moves in the story. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head over to our Company Report...
